impact: The worker was still targeting a repeatedly failed in-progress public source inventory validation task even after later accepted work. Marking that task blocked, returning the next validation task to a normal needed state, and adding explicit syntax-first repair guidance lets the daemon resume on a narrow eligible task instead of spinning on the same failed target.
summary: Unblock the PP&D daemon task board and add deterministic supervisor repair guidance for syntax-failure loops.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
